entity.summary: Vertically integrated decentralized exchange on Ink offering spot and perpetual-futures markets through a high-performance central-limit-order-book interface with on-chain settlement.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates Nado Spot, Nado Perps, the NLP liquidity vault, and the shared application under one exchange entity. No exact public launch marker is assigned in this batch.

evidence.title: Nado official trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes the active Nado perpetual and spot trading interface on Ink.

evidence.title: Nado protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol profile identifies Nado as an Ink-based spot and perpetual DEX and reports current TVL, fees, spot volume, perpetual volume, and open interest.
